description: next-evals agent-037: use updateTag in a Server Action for read-your-own-writes cache invalidation

assertions.name: includes(/import.*updateTag.*from\s+['"]next\/cache['"]/)
assertions.group: Server Action imports updateTag from next/cache

assertions.name: isDefined(a Server Action calls updateTag)
assertions.group: Server Action calls updateTag() for cache invalidation

assertions.name: isTrue(a Server Action invalidates via updateTag)
assertions.group: Does NOT use revalidateTag for read-your-own-writes (should use updateTag)

assertions.name: isFalse(no Server Action relies on revalidateTag-only invalidation)
assertions.group: Does NOT use revalidateTag for read-your-own-writes (should use updateTag)

assertions.name: isDefined(Server Action has post creation logic)
assertions.group: Server Action has post creation logic

assertions.name: commandSucceeded()
assertions.evidence:
